purpose: Replay-fixtures gate: committed redacted golden fixtures under spec/evidence/fixtures are replayed offline through wrapper-helper-equivalent checks to assert documented Clockify wire shapes (invoice tax/discount x100 read-back, time-off {count,requests} envelope, invoice-item unitPrice /100), re-scanned for secrets/un-redacted IDs, and a source-grep tripwire requires invoiceItemUnitPriceToWire at any future invoice-item/payment-create site. Pure Node, network-free, creds-free.
